name: teamtask-agent
description: TeamTask Agent wraps Feishu meeting minutes, group task assignment, progress queries, resource search, and Todo reconciliation behind a permission-aware FastAPI backend.

capabilities.name: parse_meeting_minutes_tasks
capabilities.description: Parse a Feishu Minutes link or pasted meeting notes into task candidates and initiator confirmation cards.

capabilities.name: assign_task_from_group_message
capabilities.description: Convert group chat assignment context into a task contract and initiator confirmation card.

capabilities.name: query_task_progress
capabilities.description: Match a group progress question to active task contracts and send an assignee progress confirmation card.

capabilities.name: run_task_reconciliation
capabilities.description: Compare initiator and assignee Todo Projection snapshots and generate field-diff review cards.

capabilities.name: search_related_resources
capabilities.description: Search related Feishu docs, minutes, and Base records, ranked into high and low confidence groups.
